description: Self-hosted web search for LLM agents: search -> fetch -> rank pipeline with semantic caching
name: io.github.firish/webfetch

environmentVariables.description: Optional - adds Brave to the multi-engine fusion. DDG works with no keys at all.
environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional - adds Serper (Google results) to the multi-engine fusion.
environmentVariables.name: SERPER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional - adds Tavily to the multi-engine fusion.
environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional - search strategy: multi (RRF fusion of available engines, default), fallback (priority failover), or a single engine name like ddg.
environmentVariables.name: WEBFETCH_PROVIDER

title: webfetch
